recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Finders Keepers
recommendations.overview: A haunted doll teaches one little girl why children shouldn't play with undead things.

recommendations.title: Le manoir du diable
recommendations.overview: In a medieval castle, a dark magician thought to be Mephistopheles conjures up a series of bizarre creatures and events in order to torment a pair of interloping cavaliers.

recommendations.title: The Elixir
recommendations.overview: An elixir unleashes the undead in a village. A family at odds with one another must unite and fight to survive as their hometown collapses.

recommendations.title: Burial Ground
recommendations.overview: A cursed country estate is besieged by horny houseguests, undead Etruscans, and the unusual relationship between a mother and her young son.

recommendations.title: Polaroid
recommendations.overview: High school loner Bird Fitcher has no idea what dark secrets are tied to the mysterious Polaroid vintage camera she stumbles upon, but it doesn't take long to discover that those who have their picture taken meet a tragic end. Bird and her friends mu

recommendations.title: Scars of Dracula
recommendations.overview: The Prince of Darkness casts his undead shadow once more over the cursed village of Kleinenberg when his ashes are splashed with bat's blood and Dracula is resurrected. And two innocent victims search for a missing loved one... loved to death by Drac

recommendations.title: It Follows
recommendations.overview: A young woman is followed by an unknown supernatural force after a sexual encounter.

recommendations.title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
recommendations.overview: An award-winning cynical journalist, Lloyd Vogel, begrudgingly accepts an assignment to write an Esquire profile piece on the beloved television icon Fred Rogers. After his encounter with Rogers, Vogel's perspective on life is transformed.

recommendations.title: The Exorcism of Carmen Farias
recommendations.overview: Carmen, a brave journalist, discovers soon after her mother's death that she has inherited her grandma's house. She decides to move there without knowing it hides dark secrets.
